name: Dunbar's Jambalaya
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter and brown onion in a pan.
2. Peel and devein shrimp. If using large shrimp, cut them lengthwise.
3. Add shrimp to the onion mixture and cook for about 5 minutes until bright pink.
4. In a separate pan, brown sausages into small pieces.
5. Cut ham into cubes the same size as sausage and sauté with sausage for a few minutes.
6. Blend in flour.
7. Combine meat with shrimp and add tomato paste and thyme.
8. Add water and bring to a boil.
9. Add salt and pepper to taste.
10. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
11. Cook rice according to package instructions until barely tender.
12. Stir rice into the meat mixture and continue cooking for an additional 30 minutes or until rice has absorbed all liquid and mixture is dry.
